title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude LLM was used in partnership with Atlassian and Williams F1 to visualize driver and team cognition under race pressure. The "Pattern of Thought" project debuted at Monaco, translating biometric and cognitive data into visual designs on helmets, race suits, and garage displays.
